title: Advanced Architectures Path
description: Build fluency in Advanced Architectures inside Natural Language Processing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: DataRobot AI Cloud
steps.summary: DataRobot AI Cloud belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Advanced Architectures. Start after DataRobot and AI in Architecture.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.
